gaps.title: Payment failure during overage charge
gaps.breaks: Customer service remains active after payment fails for overage charges
gaps.scenario: Tenant on Growth plan (2,499/5K tickets) hits 5,100 tickets, triggering $50 overage. Paddle payment fails but service doesn't suspend, allowing continued ticket creation
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a tenant exceeding their ticket limit, triggers overage billing, simulates a Paddle payment failure, and verifies service suspension occurs immediately

gaps.title: Race condition in subscription upgrade/downgrade
gaps.breaks: Incorrect proration when multiple plan changes occur simultaneously
gaps.scenario: Customer initiates plan upgrade from Starter to Growth while another process is processing their monthly renewal, leading to double billing or incorrect proration
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent plan change requests for the same tenant and verifies proper proration and state consistency

gaps.title: Tenant isolation breach during payment failure
gaps.breaks: One tenant's payment failure exposes another tenant's data
gaps.scenario: Tenant A's payment fails, causing system-wide rollback that accidentally exposes Tenant B's support tickets in the UI
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates payment failure for one tenant while another active tenant is using the system, verifying data isolation is maintained

gaps.title: Missing rollback on partial payment failure
gaps.breaks: Partial success leaves tenant in inconsistent state
gaps.scenario: Plan upgrade succeeds but proration calculation fails, leaving tenant with new plan but incorrect billing history
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a partial payment flow failure where one component succeeds but another fails, verifying proper rollback occurs

gaps.title: Silent failure in webhook processing
gaps.breaks: Payment renewal succeeds but system doesn't activate subscription
gaps.scenario: Monthly payment succeeds in Paddle but webhook to activate subscription fails silently, leaving tenant on expired plan
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a successful Paddle payment with a failed webhook delivery, verifying the system detects and handles this mismatch

gaps.title: State loss during system restart
gaps.breaks: In-memory payment state not recovered after restart
gaps.scenario: Tenant initiates plan upgrade, system restarts during Redis sync, leaving subscription in pending state indefinitely
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a system restart during a payment processing operation, verifying state is properly recovered from database

raw_response:
GAPS FOUND: 6

GAP 1
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Payment failure during overage charge
What breaks: Customer service remains active after payment fails for overage charges
Real scenario: Tenant on Growth plan (2,499/5K tickets) hits 5,100 tickets, triggering $50 overage. Paddle payment fails but service doesn't suspend, allowing continued ticket creation
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates a tenant exceeding their ticket limit, triggers overage billing, simulates a Paddle payment failure, and verifies service suspension occurs immediately

GAP 2
Severity: HIGH
Title: Race condition in subscription upgrade/downgrade
What breaks: Incorrect proration when multiple plan changes occur simultaneously
Real scenario: Customer initiates plan upgrade from Starter to Growth while another process is processing their monthly renewal, leading to double billing or incorrect proration
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent plan change requests for the same tenant and verifies proper proration and state consistency

GAP 3
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Tenant isolation breach during payment failure
What breaks: One tenant's payment failure exposes another tenant's data
Real scenario: Tenant A's payment fails, causing system-wide rollback that accidentally exposes Tenant B's support tickets in the UI
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates payment failure for one tenant while another active tenant is using the system, verifying data isolation is maintained

GAP 4
Severity: HIGH
Title: Missing rollback on partial payment failure
What breaks: Partial success leaves tenant in inconsistent state
Real scenario: Plan upgrade succeeds but proration calculation fails, leaving tenant with new plan but incorrect billing history
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates a partial payment flow failure where one component succeeds but another fails, verifying proper rollback occurs

GAP 5
Severity: HIGH
Title: Silent failure in webhook processing
What breaks: Payment renewal succeeds but system doesn't activate subscription
Real scenario: Monthly payment succeeds in Paddle but webhook to activate subscription fails silently, leaving tenant on expired plan
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates a successful Paddle payment with a failed webhook delivery, verifying the system detects and handles this mismatch

GAP 6
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: State loss during system restart
What breaks: In-memory payment state not recovered after restart
Real scenario: Tenant initiates plan upgrade, system restarts during Redis sync, leaving subscription in pending state indefinitely
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates a system restart during a payment processing operation, verifying state is properly recovered from database
